name: JOINT_redist_support_mean
spec: joint-frame mean (pre-standardization)

name: JOINT_redist_support_sd
spec: joint-frame sd (pre-standardization)

name: JOINT_deserving_inclusive_mean
spec: joint-frame mean (pre-standardization)

name: JOINT_deserving_inclusive_sd
spec: joint-frame sd (pre-standardization)

name: ARM_redist_support_z
spec: standardized arm on JOINT frame, OLS+countryFE cluster@country

name: ARM_redist_support_z_wild_webb
spec: wild-cluster bootstrap-t Webb6 H0 beta=0 (joint frame)

name: ARM_deserving_inclusive_z
spec: standardized arm on JOINT frame, OLS+countryFE cluster@country

name: ARM_deserving_inclusive_z_wild_webb
spec: wild-cluster bootstrap-t Webb6 H0 beta=0 (joint frame)

name: cross_eq_resid_corr
spec: corr of the two arms FE-OLS residuals (same respondents)

name: GATE_delta_equals_arm_difference
spec: |stacked delta - (beta_deserv-beta_redist)| < 1e-9

name: DELTA_full
spec: stacked task_z:D = beta_deserv-beta_redist, std outcomes, full controls, countryFE x eq, cluster@country

name: DELTA_full_wild_webb
spec: wild-cluster bootstrap-t Webb6 H0 delta=0

name: DELTA_full_wild_rademacher
spec: wild-cluster bootstrap-t Rademacher2 H0 delta=0

name: DELTA_full_se_naive_independent
spec: sqrt(se_redist^2+se_deserv^2) ignoring cross-eq covariance (for contrast)

name: DELTA_ladder_nocontrols
spec: stacked delta, controls=no controls, std outcomes

name: DELTA_ladder_nocontrols_wild_webb
spec: wild Webb6 H0 delta=0, controls=no controls

name: DELTA_ladder_demographics
spec: stacked delta, controls=demographics (age,age2,female), std outcomes

name: DELTA_ladder_demographics_wild_webb
spec: wild Webb6 H0 delta=0, controls=demographics (age,age2,female)

name: DELTA_ladder_college
spec: stacked delta, controls=+ college, std outcomes

name: DELTA_ladder_college_wild_webb
spec: wild Webb6 H0 delta=0, controls=+ college

name: DELTA_ladder_incomefull
spec: stacked delta, controls=+ income (full controls), std outcomes

name: DELTA_ladder_incomefull_wild_webb
spec: wild Webb6 H0 delta=0, controls=+ income (full controls)

name: DELTA_raw_full
spec: stacked delta on RAW outcomes (secondary; scales differ)

name: VERDICT_differ
spec: delta!=0 by wild Webb p<.05 (DIFFER)

name: VERDICT_oppose
spec: redist>0&sig AND deserving<0&sig by wild Webb (OPPOSE) -- the S2 strict test
